name: Telekinesis
tagline: Move objects and creatures with the power of thought.

baseAbility.name: Telekinesis
baseAbility.description: Standard action, close range, 0 SP. Lift and move an object up to your size limit (starts small, grows with caster level) while concentrating. Built-in special uses: Sustained Force (1 SP to maintain without concentration, giving it simple standing orders), Bludgeon (throw the object as an attack roll for damage based on its size), Catch (stop an incoming projectile/thrown object, Will save for the attacker to resist), and Hostile Lift (1 SP to lift an unwilling creature, Will save each round to escape).

talents.name: Powerful Telekinesis
talents.description: Increase the maximum size of object you can affect with telekinesis by one category.

talents.name: Telekinetic Maneuver
talents.description: Use telekinesis to perform combat maneuvers (trip, disarm, bull rush, etc.) against a creature at range.

talents.name: Telekinetic Crush
talents.description: Deal direct crushing damage to a creature you're holding with telekinesis.

talents.name: Weaponize
talents.description: Attack with raw telekinetic force as a ranged touch attack instead of needing a suitable object to throw.

talents.name: Flight
talents.description: Use telekinesis on yourself to grant a fly speed for the duration.

talents.name: Greater Speed
talents.description: Increase how far/fast you can move objects (or yourself) with telekinesis each round.

talents.name: Gravity Shift
talents.description: Alter the effective gravity on a target or area, changing fall speed or making movement harder/easier.

talents.name: Ranged Telekinesis
talents.description: Increase the range of your telekinesis by one step. Repeatable.

talents.name: Easy Focus
talents.description: Reduce the action cost needed to initiate or maintain concentration on telekinesis.

talents.name: Puppet (advanced)
talents.description: Advanced option: use telekinesis to physically manipulate a creature's limbs, forcing crude actions.
